session.assistant: The directory was untracked (no git changes). Let me check if `erk pr check` looks for the directory on disk:
session.tool_result:
Checking PR #8943 for branch plnd/remove-plan-flag-03-08-0106...
[PASS] .erk/impl-context/ not present (cleaned up) [PASS] PR body contains checkout footer
All checks passed
session.assistant:
All checks pass. Plan execution complete.
**Summary of changes:**
1. **`src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/objective_apply_landed_update.py`**: - Removed `--plan` Click option and `plan_number` parameter - Removed branch-based plan discovery fallback (`get_plan_for_branch`) - Moved PR resolution before plan resolution - Plan is now resolved using `pr_number` directly (the PR IS the plan)
2. **`tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_objective_apply_landed_update.py`**: - Removed all `--plan` args from test invocations - Aligned plan number = PR number (6517) across all tests - Removed `test_plan_direct_lookup_skips_branch_discovery` and `test_plan_direct_lookup_not_found` (tested the `--plan` flag specifically) - Replaced `test_bad_branch_no_plan` with `test_plan_not_found_for_pr` (tests plan-not-found for a given PR number) - Removed unused `issue_info_to_pr_details` import
3. **`.claude/commands/erk/system/objective-update-with-landed-pr.md`**: - Removed `--plan <number>` from documented flags and examples - Updated `--pr` description to note it's also used as the plan number
PR: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8943
